Play the over 6.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 74% model conviction at 9.2K vs 6.5 line.
Sánchez generates genuine swing-and-miss (30.7% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. PIT is roughly neutral — 26.6% MIX-K close to league average. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 7.0 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SL converts two-strike counts (26% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (1.7 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗High variance (σ2.8K) — his floor is well below projection

① Signal
Signal
Lean over 3.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (4.1K vs 3.5), 57% conviction — take it reduced.
Pérez is below average on swing-and-miss (20.8% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (FC) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. STL is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 22.16%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Moderate variance (σ2.1K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 4.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Model projects 4.1K vs 3.5 line — edge is real at current number
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.3 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Weak finishing pitch — FC at only 19% putaway, batters fight off pitches in deep counts
✗Below-average whiff rate (20.8%) — he needs everything to go right to reach the number

① Signal
Signal
Lean over 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (6.2K vs 5.5), 57% conviction — take it reduced.
Soriano generates genuine swing-and-miss (33.2% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CU is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. SEA is roughly neutral — 25.04% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ1.6K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 6.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓SEA swings vs his specific mix (25.0% MIX-K) — lineup is genuinely exploitable
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (33.2% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.2 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗CU is serviceable not dominant (21% putaway) — won't blow batters away
✗Control is a problem (4.5 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts

① Signal
Signal
Under 5.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 83% model probability below 5.5 at 3.7K projected.
Wrobleski is below average on swing-and-miss (17.8% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (SI) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. ATH is a mild headwind — 23.55% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.5) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (SI at 15% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (6.2 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 5.5 means enough talent to reach 5.5 in a deep outing

Under 6.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 75% model probability below 6.5 at 5.1K projected.
McLean sits around league average on whiff rate (25.5%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. SI is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. TOR is a mismatch for his arsenal — 19.02% MIX-K, 5+ pts below LG. These batters put his pitches in play. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Best value at the 6.5 alt line, not the main 5.5 — be on the right number.

✓TOR makes contact vs his specific mix (19.7% MIX-K) — lineup suppresses Ks naturally

Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 10.7 means the ceiling exists — a long outing can push over the number

Pass.Pass
Model projects 3.9K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Springs sits around league average on whiff rate (23.3%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (SL) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. LAD is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 21.26%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 5.0 market main — be on the right number.

Model v9.9
K Props · F5 · NRFI · methodology + weightings · v9.9 tiering
📈 Live Performance — through 2026-06-29 · 148 bets
61.5%
WIN RATE
91–57
+10.3%
ROI · $+1,123
MAE 1.96K
2.31σ
EDGE CONF
significant ✓
Overall 91–57 · bias +0.52K
61%
Overs 43–24 · bias +0.42K
64%
Unders 48–33 · bias +0.61K
59%
STRONG 10–2
83%
MOD 20–11
65%
LEAN O 15–10
60%
LEAN U 39–32
55%
⚠ Bias note: Projections run +0.52K overall. Under bias +0.61K — actuals beat proj by ~0.6K on avg when fading. Overs 64% vs unders 59%. Option A + blended LG baseline (Jun 26) reducing bias over time.
EDGE CONF 2.31σ = standard deviations above random chance (52% breakeven). >1.96σ → 95% confident the edge is real · >2.58σ → 99% confident. Current 148 bets: 95% CI = [53.7%–69.3%].
❓ CAP — Model Confidence Score
CAP = overall strength of evidence (0–100%). NOT win probability — measures how aligned the signals are. Used in tiering: STRONG ≥ 62% · MOD ≥ 58%.
≥80% all signals align · 55–70% edge exists, mixed — size down · <55% thin confidence.
① P(over) — Poisson probability of clearing the line
~40%
② Edge size — raw Ks above / below the line
~30%
③ σ stability — variance penalty on volatile pitchers
~20%
④ Blend quality — depth of L10 data vs prior weight
~10%
⚡ K Props — Strikeout Projection v9.9
6-step formula — runs in this order every session:
① Normalise L10: adj_k = raw_k × (LG_KPCT / opp_K%) · LG_KPCT_R=24.7 (RHP) · LG_KPCT_L=25.4 (LHP)
② Scale K/9 to avg IP per start
③ σ-blend: continuous sigmoid: 75/25 at σ=0 → 58/42 at σ=3 · no cliff breakpoints
④ 5-factor base_proj (whiff · fps · putaway · arsenal · park)
⑤ OPP BLEND: 50% MIX-K% + 50% BBRef K% (60/40 when ≥7 batters matched)
⑥ rm_raw = opp_kpct_eff ÷ LG_blend · HARD ow=1.00 · EASY ow=0.65
Adj L10 base · opp-normalised · σ-driven blend
32%
Whiff% vs lg avg (25%) — strongest Statcast K predictor
22%
OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (arsenal-normalised) + 40% BBRef
18%
Putaway% vs lg avg (19%) — 2-strike whiff rate
11%
FPS% vs lg avg (63%) — command drives deep counts
9%
Park factor (2.0 − park) — small but real
6%
σ variance penalty — volatile pitchers capped lower
2%
MIX-K% Option A: batter K% per pitch type ÷ LG avg for that type → rescaled to LG_KPCT (24.7 RHP · 25.4 LHP). Removes suppression on SI=11.96% / CU=14.09% pitchers vs SW=29.44% / CB=29.73%. Constants: 4S=21.98% · SI=11.96% · CH=23.14% · CU=14.09% · SL=27.12% · SW=29.44% · CB=29.73% · SF=25.88%
STRONG edge≥+1.5K · P(O)≥25% · CAP≥62% · 2u · MOD edge≥+0.5K · P(O)≥15% · CAP≥58% · 1–1.5u
LEAN O edge≥+0.5K · CAP≥45% · 0.5u · LEAN U edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥20% · 0.5u
UNDER edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥58% · 1u (1.5u if CAP≥65 + σ≤2)
🔴 F5 — First 5 Innings v9.9
blended_ERA = 0.65 × season_ERA + 0.35 × L3_ERA (live from kdata)
sp_r = (blended_ERA / 4.50) × 2.5 × park × fps_adj
lineup_r = (wRC+ / 100) × (L10_RPG / 4.35) × 2.42
F5_runs = sp_r × 0.50 + lineup_r × 0.50
SP: blended ERA (65% season + 35% L3) × park × FPS adj
50%
Lineup wRC+ vs pitcher handedness (lg avg 100)
25%
Opponent L10 R/G vs lg avg (4.35)
25%
🔁 Daily Pipeline — Locked Execution Order v9.9
Every session runs in this exact order — no manual steps between calls.
PRE-SESSION (manual inputs):
① Fill yesterday's actuals from confirmed box scores
② Fetch kdata JSON → k-props.vercel.app/api/kdata
③ Fetch lineups → rotowire.com (9 batters + hand per team)
④ Paste Ballpark Pal expanded view → parse BP_LINES
⑤ [weekly] Upload Savant CSVs → inject ars_pitches into PITCHER_META

SESSION BUILD — run_session_build():
A load_schedule_xlsx + parse_pitchers_from_json → pitcher list
B session_build() → baseline projection (L10, sigma, blend, wRC+, park)
C Inject real lineups → builtins._RECENT_LINEUPS
D Apply BP_LINES → alt_lines_real (field='fd', not 'fd_over')
E Re-run proj_k_v99 with real lineups → mix_kpct, bbref_kpct, opp_kpct_eff
F best_line_tier_175 → tier_k, best_line, best_cap per pitcher
G Force pass + sync CSS for no-candidate pitchers
H over_odds / under_odds from alt_lines_real at best_line
I ep = Poisson P(over best_line) per pitcher
J _finalize_pitchers — ONE call, all fields set
K Post-finalize sync: pass display + under_odds insurance

ASSEMBLE — assemble_index():
→ Builds all cards · injects CSS · writes index.html · saves RESULTS.json
→ No manual post-processing — one call produces final output
🎯 NRFI / YRFI — First Inning v9.9
λ_base = f(ERA, FPS%, WHIP, park)
woba_ratio = top4_lineup_avg_woba ÷ 0.318 (LG avg)
λ_adj = λ_base × (0.70 + 0.30 × woba_ratio)
P(NRFI) = e^(−λ_away) × e^(−λ_home)
Pitcher: ERA · FPS% · WHIP → Poisson λ base
70%
Top-4 lineup woba ÷ 0.318 LG avg (Savant, fresh daily)
30%
NRFI ≥62% · NRFI lean 57–61% · Skip 43–56% · YRFI ≤42%
Top-4 hitters with Savant woba. Danger ≥.400 · Watch ≥.360 · Manageable <.360
📐 Implied Odds Box
Poisson (λ = proj K) → probability + American odds per alt line threshold.
BET row = our recommended line. MKT row = market main (~+100 crossover).
⚠ bet · mkt N in card summary = our line differs from market — be on the right number.
P(K ≥ n) = 1 − Σ(k=0 to n−1) [e^−λ × λ^k / k!]
P≥50%: −round(P/(1−P)×100) · P<50%: +round((1−P)/P×100)
🎯 Arsenal MATCH Score MATCH = P·WHF% × (OPP·WHF% ÷ LG·WHF%) per pitch — pitcher quality × lineup vulnerability. Uses real lineup whiff rates from Savant batter DB. ELITE≥33 · GOOD≥26 · AVG≥19 · WEAK<19. Best pitch shown in card summary teaser alongside opp K% rank. 📡 Data Sources
✓ Real (API) — L10 K counts · pitch counts · season ERA/K9/BB9/WHIP · FanDuel alt lines + odds
✓ Savant CSV — batter woba/K%/PA per pitch type (572 batters) · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
⚠ Researched — team wRC+ · L10 R/G · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef K% splits (updated Jun 8)
✗ Gaps — live Statcast splits · real-time lineup changes (L10 opp now backfilled from schedule · hand-split KPCT)
↑
